name: TLPHRKTINSDEL
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[TLPHRKTINSDEL] ON [dbo].[TALEPHAREKETLERI]
FOR INSERT, DELETE
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON

DECLARE @TB_REF AS INT
DECLARE @TD_REF AS INT

DECLARE Dcur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
select DISTINCT TB_REF from DELETED
OPEN Dcur;  
FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur 
INTO @TB_REF;
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
BEGIN  
	
	IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TALEPHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE TB_REF=@TB_REF AND MIKTAR-SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR>0 AND STATUS=0)>0
		UPDATE TALEPFISLERI SET STATUS=0 WHERE TB_REF=@TB_REF AND STATUS=1 AND KKULLANICI_REF=0
	ELSE 
		UPDATE TALEPFISLERI SET STATUS=1 WHERE TB_REF=@TB_REF AND STATUS=0 AND KKULLANICI_REF=0

FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur
INTO @TB_REF;
END  
CLOSE Dcur;  
DEALLOCATE Dcur;


DECLARE Icur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
select DISTINCT TB_REF from INSERTED
OPEN Icur;  
FETCH NEXT FROM Icur 
INTO @TB_REF;
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
BEGIN  
	
	IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TALEPHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE TB_REF=@TB_REF AND MIKTAR-SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR>0 AND STATUS=0)>0
		UPDATE TALEPFISLERI SET STATUS=0 WHERE TB_REF=@TB_REF AND STATUS=1 AND KKULLANICI_REF=0
	ELSE 
		UPDATE TALEPFISLERI SET STATUS=1 WHERE TB_REF=@TB_REF AND STATUS=0 AND KKULLANICI_REF=0

FETCH NEXT FROM Icur
INTO @TB_REF;
END  
CLOSE Icur;  
DEALLOCATE Icur
